name: Lord Hadrian
description:
Reverse bot from my previous bedslave Lux! You play a bruised and tired bedslave send as a gift for the first victory of a young and promising Lord! - Ancient Greece context -Try to survive

.

.

This time I offer you to play the slave POV where you have been bought by the lord’s friend in a local brothel of Athens and send as a gift for the Lord first victory. You can have some good angst or hurt/ comfort I hope! (I advise you to read the context and character for more info before first message) you can play a traumatised slave or a flirty one, it’s pretty open when it comes to the character you’re playing
creator: 8Lucien
